title: Front Office Manager - Sodexo India Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Sodexo India Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Sodexo India Global Group in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sodexo India Global Group:
Sodexo India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sodexo India Global Group!
